2606.11499.title: Hubs or Fringes: Pretraining Data Selection via Web Graph Centrality
2606.11499.paper_summary: The performance of modern language models depends critically on pretraining data composition. Yet existing data selection methods rely on auxiliary classifiers for document scoring or mixture optimization, adding computational overhead and dependence on labeled data. We propose WebGraphMix, a lightweight data selection framework that computes structural centrality scores over the Common Crawl host-level web graph and uses them to vary the proportion of central versus peripheral documents in the pretraining mixture. We hypothesize that central hosts expose models to reusable abstractions, while peripheral hosts encode specialized, long-tail knowledge. WebGraphMix computes centrality scores efficiently at web scale, requiring no model training, labeled data, or downstream supervision. We integrate WebGraphMix into the DataComp-LM pipeline and train models at 400M and 1B parameter scales with 8B and 28B tokens respectively, evaluating on 23 tasks ranging from factual knowledge to symbolic reasoning. Our experiments show that central and peripheral web regions encode complementary capabilities. Mixture combining both at a ratio of 1:1 achieves 41.4% on average, compared to 39.8% for uniform sampling. Combining structural scores with document-level quality classifier scores further improves performance to 43.8%. These findings demonstrate that web graph topology is a meaningful axis for pretraining data curation, capturing information that is largely orthogonal to existing content-based approaches.
2606.11499.paper_summary_zh: 現代語言模型的性能在很大程度上依賴於預訓練數據的組成。<lb/>然而，現有的數據選擇方法依賴於輔助分類器進行文檔打分或混合優化，這增加了計算開銷並依賴於標記數據。<lb/>我們提出了WebGraphMix，一種輕量級的數據選擇框架，該框架計算Common Crawl主機級別網絡圖的結構中心性分數，並利用這些分數來改變預訓練混合中中心文檔與周邊文檔的比例。<lb/>我們假設中心主機使模型接觸到可重用的抽象，而周邊主機則編碼專門的長尾知識。<lb/>WebGraphMix在網絡規模上高效計算中心性分數，無需模型訓練、標記數據或下游監督。<lb/>我們將WebGraphMix整合到DataComp-LM管道中，並在400M和1B參數規模上訓練模型，分別使用8B和28B標記，並在23個任務上進行評估，這些任務涵蓋了從事實知識到符號推理的範疇。<lb/>我們的實驗顯示，中心和周邊的網絡區域編碼了互補的能力。<lb/>以1:1的比例混合兩者的結果平均達到41.4%，而均勻抽樣則為39.8%。<lb/>將結構分數與文檔級質量分類器分數結合進一步提高了性能，達到43.8%。<lb/>這些發現表明，網絡圖拓撲是一個有意義的預訓練數據策劃軸心，捕捉到的信息在很大程度上與現有的基於內容的方法正交。
2606.11499.author: Vedant Badoni et.al.
2606.11499.authors: Vedant Badoni, Danqi Chen, Xinyi Wang
